notes: v34.3 • Frontend-only. Session persistence (sessionStorage, refresh stays logged in). Tab restructure: Adjust→Money (Instant Adjustment, Reports), Settings child-only (Allowance, Rates, Savings Goals, Child Profile, Parent Settings →). Parent Settings sheet with My Children, email, PIN, Danger Zone — accessible from child selector and Settings tab. Manage Money dropdown hides Loan payment/Move to Savings when not applicable. Savings Goals removed from EXIT_WARN_SHEETS. Delete Account modal body fix. Share child in-app notification on recipient login. Wizard: chore rewards Yes/No pill (Step 1), hides reward+streak reward in chore creator, $0 hint, streak start-at hidden, Step 8 adds Share Child alongside Celebration. Dead code cleanup.
